hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='.knowledge';if(!fs.existsSync(p+'/INDEX.md')){process.exit(0)}const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);const sDir=p+'/sessions';const hasLog=fs.existsSync(sDir)&&fs.readdirSync(sDir).some(f=>f.startsWith(today));const agentLog=p+'/agents/agent-log.jsonl';const hasWork=fs.existsSync(agentLog)&&fs.readFileSync(agentLog,'utf8').split('\n').filter(l=>l.trim()).some(l=>{try{return JSON.parse(l).ts&&JSON.parse(l).ts.startsWith(today)}catch{return false}});if(hasWork&&!hasLog){console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Meaningful work detected but no session log in .knowledge/sessions/'+today+'-*.md. Write a session summary before ending.'}));process.exit(0)}console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'allow'}))"

node -e "if(require('fs').existsSync('.knowledge/INDEX.md')){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'[KnowledgeVault] MANDATORY: Write session summary to .knowledge/sessions/YYYY-MM-DD-topic.md if meaningful work was done.'}}))}"
